prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that implement Ingress API handling for both v1beta1 and v1: the conversion functions between versions, the validation changes (pathType became required), and the storage version migration logic.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
